personal.preferred_title: Data Platform Engineer | Databricks Lakehouse, Governance, PySpark/SQL

summary: Senior Data Platform Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong production background in Python, SQL, PySpark/Spark-oriented pipelines, data governance, operational monitoring, documentation, and platform reliability. Experienced building governed data pipelines and reporting datasets in regulated financial-services environments, with hands-on AWS data platform work across S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena, EC2/ECS, and telemetry-driven analytics. Currently extending production AWS/PySpark experience into Databricks lakehouse platform patterns including Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, DLT, Databricks Workflows, cluster/job concepts, RBAC/ABAC governance concepts, schema enforcement, and medallion architecture. Strong fit for platform enablement roles requiring standards, templates, onboarding, documentation, monitoring, data quality, and reliable delivery across analytics and AI teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and operated Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual preparation with repeatable data flows used for capacity analytics and executive reporting.

Built governed reporting and forecasting datasets in a regulated banking environment, applying SQL, schema design, data validation, historical retention, reconciliation, and documentation practices to improve trust in production outputs.

Developed AWS-based data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and cloud-oriented processing patterns to modernize on-premise telemetry and forecasting workflows.
Designed optimized Oracle and Redshift-backed data structures for large historical telemetry volumes, improving query reliability and enabling scalable capacity forecasting analysis.
Implemented ML forecasting pipelines using Prophet and scikit-learn, connecting curated operational datasets to analytics and AI/ML decision-support use cases.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with controls for completeness, accuracy, failure investigation, and operational support.
Created Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and SQL-backed dashboards for capacity, risk, and usage visibility, translating platform data into clear stakeholder and executive insights.

Supported production troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, pipeline issue resolution, and workflow improvements across telemetry ingestion, data quality, reporting, and operational monitoring processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems and transformed real-user and synthetic telemetry into analytics used by engineering teams.
Led the FAST project, data-mining performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-critical digital systems.
Implemented End-User Monitoring and transaction tracing across web and mobile systems, improving visibility into operational workflows, service behavior, and reliability issues.
Partnered with engineering teams during AWS migration planning, providing observability, performance, and operational-readiness analysis for cloud transition decisions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting enterprise platform reliability and telemetry governance.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and management modules used as repeatable standards across client monitoring environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual exports, improving consistency and repeatability of operational data workflows.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and training for internal teams and customer stakeholders, helping standardize platform usage and troubleshooting practices.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and performance.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing routines to verify migration accuracy across high-volume transactional datasets.
Optimized database access patterns and transaction processing logic, reducing hardware footprint while maintaining reliability for mission-critical workloads.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Databricks Lakehouse Upskilling Lab
projects.description: Built local learning projects around Delta Lake, medallion architecture, Unity Catalog concepts, DLT concepts, Databricks Workflows concepts, schema enforcement, MERGE/upsert patterns, and lakehouse reliability patterns to bridge AWS/PySpark production experience into Databricks platform roles.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark-oriented forecasting platform for banking-scale telemetry, turning raw infrastructure data into curated forecasting datasets and decision-support dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and Bedrock to support analytics and AI data access use cases.
